title: Finite Network Flow And Cut Certificates

solver_reuse.target: finite network-flow cut-bound QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact replay checks one feasible flow and one cut certificate, then the source-linked QF_LRA artifact isolates the malformed value-4 flow claim as the impossible cut-bound obligation 4 <= 3.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional flow rows only when they add distinct capacity, conservation, cut-bound, residual-network, or proof-reconstruction pressure; keep the general max-flow/min-cut theorem in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Replay finite directed capacities, flows, conservation equations, and source/sink balance over exact rationals.
Replay finite cut partitions and cut capacities before using a cut as an optimality certificate.
Reject malformed rows by recomputing the violating capacity bound or cut-capacity upper bound.
Keep the promoted cut-bound row tied to a committed SMT-LIB artifact and checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence.
Keep arbitrary-network max-flow/min-cut, integrality, algorithm correctness, min-cost flow, and asymptotic complexity as Lean/theorem horizons until proof artifacts exist.
